summary: This ERC defines standard formats for parameterized string keys used in EVM key-value storage. It supports two encodings: a slash/colon form for a single parameter (`<key-label>/<key-parameter>` or `<key-label>:<key-parameter>`) and a bracket form for one or more parameters (`<key-label>[<key-parameter-1>][<key-parameter-2>]...`).
title: Parameterized Storage Keys
